name: Freya
intro: Freya, the Valkyrie, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Power of Einherjar
abilities.description: Buff Freya gains 1 Sacred Orb with each Basic Attack (up to 6 Sacred Orbs ). Consuming 1 Sacred Orb grants Freya 100% Attack Speed for her next Basic Attack (max 6 stacks). Sacred Orbs gradually recover when out of combat. Skill terms Attack Speed Current Attack Speed = Base Attack Speed + Extra Attack Speed × Attack Speed Ratio. The current total Attack Speed determines the number of attacks per second (capped at 3 attacks per second).

abilities.name: Leap of Faith
abilities.description: CC Shield Freya leaps to the target area and strikes the ground with her shield, gaining 500–900 (+100% Total Physical Attack) shield and dealing 200–300 (+80% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies within while knocking them airborne for 0.4 seconds. Skill terms Airborne High level Crowd Control: Prevents a target from moving, and using Basic Attacks and skills. Can interrupt a large number of skills, and Blink/Charge effects.

abilities.name: Valkyrie Slash
abilities.description: Mobility Damage Freya charges forward and slashes, dealing 150–300 and slowing enemies by 30% for 0.5 seconds. This skill has no base cooldown but consumes 2 Sacred Orbs per cast. This skill deals 50% damage to creeps.

abilities.name: Valkyrie Descent
abilities.description: Morph Buff Freya selects a target area and dives down as a Valkyrie (gaining Control Immunity and 50% Damage Reducion), dealing 300–550 (+75% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage and 40% slow to enemies in her path and at the landing point for 2 seconds. Upon landing, Freya enters the Valkyrie state for 12 seconds, during which her Basic Attacks deal 30-60 extra damage (extra damage cannot Crit) and she recovers 60–120 (+40% Total Physical Attack) per Basic Attack , and her Basic Attacks deal splash damage.
